final:
// // This module implements an 8-bit divider with a reset capability. When the reset input is HIGH, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, the output contains the quotient of the two 8-bit inputs, a and b, producing an 8-bit result.
module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input reset,
    output reg [15:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if (reset == 0) begin
            out <= 0;
        end
        else begin
            out <= a * b;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an 8-bit divider with a reset capability. When the reset input is HIGH, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, the output contains the quotient of the two 8-bit inputs, a and b, producing an 8-bit result.
